perks.summary: extract text/markdown from a .docx via pandoc, preserving tracked changes (read-only)
unpack a .docx into a pretty-printed XML directory (merges runs, escapes smart quotes)
validate a .docx (or unpacked dir) against OOXML XSD schemas + redlining rules, with auto-repair
add a comment (or threaded reply) into an unpacked .docx directory's comment parts
repack an unpacked XML directory into a .docx (validate + auto-repair + condense)
accept all tracked changes in a .docx via LibreOffice, writing a clean copy
